```mjs title=main.mjs
import { readFile as external_fs_readFile, writeFile as external_fs_writeFile } from "fs";

import { createRequire as __rspack_createRequire } from "node:module";
const __rspack_createRequire_require = __rspack_createRequire(import.meta.url);
// fs?f23b

// ./module.js


console.log.bind(console)

// fs?771d

// ./index.js


it('should handle aliased external', async () => {
	const {f, w} = await import(/*webpackIgnore: true*/'./main.mjs')

	expect(f).toBe(__rspack_createRequire_require('fs').readFile)
	expect(w).toBe(__rspack_createRequire_require('fs').writeFile)
})



export { external_fs_readFile as f, external_fs_writeFile as w };

```
